Question: Match the following changes with their type
Answer:
A. Melting of Ice - 1. Physical Change
B. Burning of Paper - 2. Chemical Change
C. Boiling Water - 1. Physical Change
D. Rusting of Iron - 2. Chemical Change
E. Chopping Wood - 1. Physical Change

Answer:

B. Dissolving Sugar in Water - 1. Physical Change
C. Breaking Glass - 1. Physical Change
D. Cutting Paper - 1. Physical Change
E. Stretching Rubber - 1. Physical Change

Question: Match the following with examples of chemical change
Answer:

B. Burning Candle - 2. Chemical Change
C. Ripening of Fruit - 2. Chemical Change
D. Rusting Iron - 2. Chemical Change
E. Baking Cake - 2. Chemical Change
